title: cheirinia nivalis var. radicata
intro: Cheirinia nivalis var. radicata, also known as Snow Queen, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Cheirinia nivalis plant species, a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cheirinia nivalis var. radicata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
